summary: A Go-based monolithic project featuring a test runner and MCP handlers, currently cluttered by numerous auto-generated agent test sessions.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated/agent-produced extra test files cluttering the repository
Merge conflicts in recent commits indicating concurrent agent modifications
Untracked and modified files in git status suggesting incomplete commits
Session metadata files being committed alongside source code
suggestions: Clean up or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents directories to reduce repository noise
Establish a gating mechanism for agent-generated code before merging
Resolve the current untracked and modified files to achieve a clean working tree
Separate session metadata from source code commits
